com.saxonica.functions.json

Class JsonHandlerXML

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.saxonica.functions.json.JsonHandlerXML
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    JsonHandler

    public class JsonHandlerXML
extends java.lang.Object
implements JsonHandler
    Handler to generate an XML representation of JSON from a series of events

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      static java.lang.String JSON_NS 
      boolean liberal

      boolean unescape 
      boolean validate

      Constructor and Description
      JsonHandlerXML(XPathContext context, int flags)
      Make the handler to construct the XML tree representation for JSON

    • Constructor Detail

      • JsonHandlerXML

        public JsonHandlerXML(XPathContext context,
              int flags)
               throws XPathException
        Make the handler to construct the XML tree representation for JSON
        Parameters:
        context - the context in which the result tree is to be built
        flags - flags indicating the chosen options
        Throws:
        XPathException - if initialization fails, for example because of problems loading the schema

    • Method Detail

      • setType

        public void setType(java.lang.String name,
           SchemaType st)
        Record a SchemaType for a particular name
        Parameters:
        name - the name to be used for the type, e.g. "arrayType"
        st - the schema type to be used for typing such entities

      • setKey

        public void setKey(java.lang.String key)
        Set the key to be written for the next entry in an object/map
        Specified by:
        setKey in interface JsonHandler
        Parameters:
        key - the key for the entry - null implies no key

      • getResult

        public Item getResult()
               throws XPathException
        Return the complete parsed result
        Specified by:
        getResult in interface JsonHandler
        Returns:
        the XML document for this JSON
        Throws:
        XPathException

      • containsEscape

        protected boolean containsEscape(java.lang.String literal)
        Check whether a string contains an escape sequence
        Parameters:
        literal - the string to be checked
        Returns:
        true if the string contains a backslash

      • startArray

        public void startArray()
                throws XPathException
        Open a new array
        Specified by:
        startArray in interface JsonHandler
        Throws:
        XPathException - if a dynamic error occurs

      • endArray

        public void endArray()
              throws XPathException
        Close the current array
        Specified by:
        endArray in interface JsonHandler
        Throws:
        XPathException - if a dynamic error occurs

        public void startMap()
              throws XPathException
        Start a new object/map
        Specified by:
        startMap in interface JsonHandler
        Throws:
        XPathException - if a dynamic error occurs

        public void endMap()
            throws XPathException
        Close the current object/map
        Specified by:
        endMap in interface JsonHandler
        Throws:
        XPathException - if a dynamic error occurs

      • writeNumeric

        public void writeNumeric(java.lang.String asString,
                double asDouble)
                  throws XPathException
        Write a numeric value
        Specified by:
        writeNumeric in interface JsonHandler
        Parameters:
        asString - the string representation of the value
        asDouble - the double representation of the value
        Throws:
        XPathException - if a dynamic error occurs

      • writeString

        public void writeString(java.lang.String val)
                 throws XPathException
        Write a string value
        Specified by:
        writeString in interface JsonHandler
        Parameters:
        val - the string to be written. This will be in unescaped form if unescaping was requested in the flags, otherwise it may contain JSON escape sequences
        Throws:
        XPathException - if a dynamic error occurs

      • writeBoolean

        public void writeBoolean(boolean value)
                  throws XPathException
        Write a boolean value
        Specified by:
        writeBoolean in interface JsonHandler
        Parameters:
        value - the boolean value to be written
        Throws:
        XPathException - if a dynamic error occurs

      • writeNull

        public void writeNull()
               throws XPathException
        Write a null value
        Specified by:
        writeNull in interface JsonHandler
        Throws:
        XPathException - if a dynamic error occurs
